name: upgrade
description: The product is an upgrade from a previous version.
examples: This was purchased as an upgrade from a very old ipad we had

name: sufficient_product
description: The product meets the customer's needs.
examples: it's more than enough product for us

name: pleased_with_purchase
description: The customer is satisfied with their purchase.

name: non-essential_feature
description: A feature is not considered essential by the customer.
examples: the lack of a simple power button was no biggie
